parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', message: 'Invalid input: orders must be between 1-40 and driver_id is required' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'error', message: 'Route optimization failed: Google API returned no routes. Check addresses and try again.' }) }}

assignments.name: customers_list
assignments.value: ={{ $('Edit Fields').first().json.orders.map(o => ({ order_id: o.id, customer_name: o.customer_name, customer_phone: o.customer_phone, address: o.address })) }}

parameters.errorMessage: Invalid input: orders must be between 1-40 and driver_id is required

assignments.name: stops
assignments.value: ={{ $json.stops.map(s => ({ orderId: s.order_id, order_id: s.order_id, estimatedArrival: s.eta.substring(11, 16), customer_name: s.customer_name, customer_phone: s.customer_phone, address: s.address })) }}

assignments.name: returnTime
assignments.value: ={{ (() => { const totalSec = parseInt($json.total_duration.toString().replace('s','')); const parts = $json.departure_time.split(':').map(Number); const h = parts[0]; const m = parts[1]; const totalMin = h * 60 + m + Math.round(totalSec / 60); const rh = Math.floor(totalMin / 60) % 24; const rm = totalMin % 60; return String(rh).padStart(2,'0') + ':' + String(rm).padStart(2,'0'); })() }}

assignments.name: message
assignments.value: ={{ $json.route_type === 'delivery' ? 'Delivery route optimized successfully' : 'Pickup route optimized successfully' }}
